en: And don't worry about the vase. What vase?
I said don't worry about it.
I'll get one of my kids to fix it. How did you know?
ko: 내 아이 중 한 명에게 고치게 할게.

en: Oh, what's really going to bake your noodle later on is, would you still have broken it
ko: 나중에 정말 너를 놀라게 할 건...
내가 아무 말 안 했어도 너는 그걸 깨뜨렸을까?

en: I can see why she likes you. Who?
You know why Morpheus brought you to see me.
ko: 너를 나에게 데려온 이유를 알고 있지?

en: So, what do you think? Do you think you're the one?
